Custom field (Release Note): The system now adheres to the coding standards by removing the forbidden `@author` tag from certain modules, enhancing the overall code quality. Previously, the presence of this tag in some modules was in violation of the established coding standards.

Summary: Tax rate admin ui error
Custom field (Release Note):
This ticket fixed a Tax Rate admin UI issue where switching the country (e.g., from US → UK) still displayed the previously selected US state, misleading users.
In 2.4.9-alpha3, the state field now resets to * when the selected country has no states.

Summary: Add to Requisition list button disappears when we try to add it from catgory page
Custom field (Release Note): Earlier Add to Requisition list button disappears when we try to add it from catgory page which is now fixed and we can see the requisition button on category page

Summary: [Issue] Improve Extensibility of Service URL Generation
Custom field (Release Note): The system now allows for customization of the Service URL Generation function via plugins, promoting a more maintainable approach to modifications. Previously, customization of this function was achieved through preferences, which may not have been as efficient or maintainable.

Summary: [Issue] Remove forbidden `@author` tag from `Magento_Backend`
Custom field (Release Note): This PR removes `@author` tag from the codebase

Summary: GraphQL query "customerOrders" with "number" attribute causes internal server error
Custom field (Release Note):
Fixed issue where the GraphQL customerOrders query returned an internal server error when requesting the number field.
Now, the resolver correctly returns the order increment ID, allowing the query to execute successfully and retrieve the order number.

Summary: [Issue] Fix variable name in catalogsearch
Custom field (Release Note): The system now correctly names variables in the search engine module, enhancing code clarity and maintainability. Previously, an irrelevant variable name, $defaultCountry, was used in the search engine module, causing confusion.

Summary: `/orders`(or `/orders/{id}`) endpoint missing "state" and "status" fields
Custom field (Release Note):
Fixed issue where the `/orders` and `/orders/{id}` API responses omitted the state and status fields when database values were null.
Now, both fields are consistently returned in the response, ensuring compliance with API documentation and improving data reliability.

Summary: Console error in Email preview in the Magento admin
Custom field (Release Note): The system will not throw any console error when we are previewing the email template

Summary: [Issue] magento/magento2#: GraphQl mutation. Additional test coverage for customer storeConfig settings.
Custom field (Release Note):
The System now adds the additional test coverage for the next customer storeConfig options:
required_character_classes_number
minimum_password_length

Summary: [Issue] Avoid direct access to reviews list Ajax
Custom field (Release Note): The system correctly handles and Avoid direct access to reviews list Ajax

Summary: Refund with negative qty alway refund discound
Custom field (Release Note):
Fixed issue where creating a credit memo with a negative quantity incorrectly refunded the discount amount.
Now, discounts are not refunded for negative quantities, and the refund quantity is correctly set to zero.

Summary: Cart price rule with condition SKU doesn't take into account the "leading zeros" in the SKU (sku: 01234 is the same as 1234)
Custom field (Release Note): The System now correctly handles Cart price rule with condition SKU take into account the "leading zeros" in the SKU

Summary: Place order with disabled Payment method working
Custom field (Release Note):
Fixed an issue where orders could be placed using a disabled payment method via GraphQL.
Now, an error is returned when attempting to set or use an unavailable payment method, preventing the order from being created.

Summary: [Issue] Set price on quote item instead of base_price
Custom field (Release Note): The system correctly handles quote item's price set to the base_price instead of the price if you have multiple currencies in one website on the frontend

Summary: Products graphql returned disabled categories in the category aggregations
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix disabled categories aren't returned for the products GraphQl request.

Summary: GraphQL Response for Order placement does not include the exception message
Custom field (Release Note): Reverted previous change that was returning errors in a different format. Now potential errors are returned in a consistent manner, not breaking GraphQL schema. This should be added as known BIC, approved by PM here: https://jira.corp.adobe.com/browse/ACP2E-3399?focusedId=45248897&page=com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.issuetabpanels:comment-tabpanel#comment-45248897

Summary: Slow query is executed when product widget is included via pagebuilder
Custom field (Release Note): The Query for product widgets creation including product SKUs is optimized.

Summary: Expired persistent quotes are not cleaned up by a cron job sales_clean_quotes
Custom field (Release Note): The expired persistent quotes are now cleared when the 'persistent_clear_expired' cron job runs. Previously, the expired persistent quotes where not cleared by any other cron job.

Summary: Product images not resized when added as configurable product
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, images added through Configurations in the admin panel did not adhere to the maximum upload size limit, which could lead to inconsistencies and management challenges. Now, a fix has been implemented to ensure that images are automatically resized during upload to comply with the maximum size limit, streamlining the process and maintaining system standards.

Summary: GraphQL Response for Order placement is partially localised
Custom field (Release Note): Errors returned by placeOrder GraphQl mutation were not fully localized. Now, in a multilanguage context, errors are properly translated.

Summary: [Cloud] Some Inline Javascript does not work after upgrade to magento 2.4.6-p7
Custom field (Release Note): Clicking on "delete" button in "Add to Order by SKU" in admin will now remove the SKU. Previously, clicking on"delete" button in "Add to Order by SKU" did not remove the SKU.

Summary: Issue with Default Attribute Option Value Behavior for Multiselect
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix default values for multiple options attribute were not being saved properly. Now, after the fix, the values are properly stored in the database.

Summary: [Cloud] Bug when adding products to category
Custom field (Release Note): The pagination and record count label now work correctly when adding products to a category via the popup grid. Previously, loading only a single page with items equal to the page size caused issues with the item selection dropdown.

Summary: indexer_update_all_views cron error with MAGE_INDEXER_THREADS_COUNT
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed issue for MAGE_INDEXER_THREADS_COUNT > 2 with Customer Segment indexer

Summary: Backend admin menu subtitles not displaying
Custom field (Release Note): All titles of the main menu groups will now be properly displayed. Previously, if the second or third column of the main menu contained only one group of links, the title of the group was not displayed.

Summary: "Something went wrong" error on checkout for inactive company
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, the logout action was not being completed properly on the cart page, if the longged in user company was no longer enabled. Now, if the company is no longer available, the logout is performed properly.

Summary: Async Bulk Operation remains in open state for async.magento.configurableproduct.api.optionrepositoryinterface.save.post
Custom field (Release Note): Bulk API endpoints will now throw an error if the request body is not an Array, thus requiring bulk item keys to be consecutive numbers starting from 0. Previously, bulk item status was not updated due to the arbitrary item key submitted in the bulk request.

Summary: Exception while adding "Conditions Combination" in Page Builder Products widget condition
Custom field (Release Note): The issue has been fixed by adding a check to skip missing or incomplete conditions. Previously, this caused error logs to be generated due to the handling of incomplete conditions in the system.

Summary: Unable to upload image with relatively small width
Custom field (Release Note): The system no longer fails to resize image with relatively small width to its height.

Summary: Issue while moving the product qty to back to shopping cart from the admin
Custom field (Release Note): When creating an order from the admin, products in the customer cart on the sidebar will not disappear when added to the order.

Summary: [CLOUD] API REST bug on is_subscribed value not considering from the current store  using searchCriteria
Custom field (Release Note):
API REST Customer query fetches the correct "is_subscribed" value from the correct store using searchCriteria
Previously the API REST Customer query did not consider store when fetching is_subscribed" value.

Summary: Browser crash when loading attribute set
Custom field (Release Note): Browser no longer crashes on attribute set edit page if there are more than 4k product attributes

Summary: Addresses selection is not saved when we "Check Out with Multiple Addresses"
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix when cancelling the multishipping option, the address was not preselected when reverting back to multshipping. Now, the default address is replaced with one of the selections made within the multishipping screen.

Summary: Weak Password Management
Custom field (Release Note): The admin user cannot be saved when using the same password. Previously, it was saved successfully without a proper validation.

Summary: Admin displays incorrect currency symbol on when creating return
Custom field (Release Note): In a multi-website setup with different currencies (EUR/USD/GBP), the return product selection page in admin is now displaying the correct tcurrency symbol. Previously, it displayed the default currency symbol.

Summary: REST endpoint Product Import Json not validate the mandatory fields
Custom field (Release Note): Name field is now required when creating new products through the import process  (admin or API). Prior to the fix, you could have created new products without name, this would have broken the admin interface and created invalid products.

Summary: gift_cards serialized data is inconsistent in the sales_order table
Custom field (Release Note): gift_cards data in sales_order table is now serialized correctly. Previously, it was serialized every time the order was updated.

Summary: Page Builder's Product component doesn't work if the user doesn't have Widget permission
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, when accessing a widget without permissions, the page was throwing a generic error and displaying a "loading" GIF. Now, after the fix, a modal window is displayed with "Sorry, you need permissions to view this content." message.

Summary: [Mainline] Cart Price rule is not respecting Multishipping
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the implementation of this correction, the cart price rule for multi-shipping products did not apply correctly when sub-select conditions were applied and free shipping was enabled. However, since the correction was applied, the cart price rule for multi-shipping carts now functions as intended.

Summary: [CLOUD] Product URL Rewrites Not Created for New Store: Go Live Blocker
Custom field (Release Note):
Product URL Rewrites for New Store is successfully created. 
Previously operation ended with memory leak or with timeout.

Summary: Previewing a scheduled update opens the first store view in alphabetical order instead of the store view of interest
Custom field (Release Note):
Previous to the fix, the preview of a scheduled update opened in the first store view in alphabetical order instead of the assigned store view.
After the fix, the preview now correctly opens in the store view assigned to the CMS block staging update.

Summary: allow_parallel_generation should be set through environment variable
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, the "MAGENTO_DC_CACHE__ALLOW_PARALLEL_GENERATION" environment variable can be used to set the "allow_parallel_generation" configuration.

Summary: Staging_apply_version Cron behavior issue -  special_price ignored
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, quotes totals will be recalculated after changing special price by scheduled product update.

Summary: Exception while creating UPS shipping label
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed Warning: Array to string conversion during UPS shipping label creation

Summary: Action logs for content staging
Custom field (Release Note): The Action Logs now will show the Staging Update activities. Previously, the Staging Update log was not recorded in the Admin Action Logs.

Summary: Attribute Default Value for Options Not Working
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, when we changed the default value of a product select attribute, it appeared as an array element with the previous values. After this fix is applied, when we update a product attribute value it will save as a single element at eav_attribute table.

Summary: Wrong catalog price rule discount applied to the child product
Custom field (Release Note): Fixes the issue where the catalog price rule for the variation is overridden by the parent configurable product, in case where both rules have the same priority.

Summary: Incorrect Gift Card Code URL in the email when purchased in from the secondary website
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, the multi-store setup and gift card for non-default stores always redirected the gift card claim to the default website. After this fix is applied, the email will redirect the gift card claim link to the correct scope or website.

Summary: Gift Card validation fails when editing due to thousand separator
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed issue with gift card product type saving when the gift card amount is 1000 and more.

Summary: [Cloud] Changing table column type from Int to Decimal using db_schema.xml file In Magento 2 Results In Errors
Custom field (Release Note): Changing the column data type is not working correctly. Previously, it throws an error: The attribute 'identity' is not allowed.

Summary: Environment specific unit tests failures in AC 2.4.7-p3
Custom field (Release Note): This issue fixes unit test failures that are not reproducing on all versions and environments. Previously to the fix some unit tests failed due different library versions or due to missing functionality added in a later version.

Summary: Missing Website Filter Option in Export Process
Custom field (Release Note): It is now possible to filter products by websites when creating products export.

Summary: Category Permissions module possibly preventing caching
Custom field (Release Note): 3rd party controllers now cached correc tly with customer segments

Summary: The grand total calculation does not including the Tax amount
Custom field (Release Note): Order contains correct totals when places from existing Purchase Order with Cross Border Trade enabled.

Summary: Store Pickup not respecting maximum search radius when address is changed at checkout
Custom field (Release Note): Now pre-selected store in "Pick in Store" will update if the shipping address changes. Previously, once a store was pre-selected, it did not change even if the new shipping address is not within the radius of the selected store

Summary: Incorrect config path for remote storage path style configuration
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, setting the remote storage path style configuration will impact the actual AWS S3 path style configuration.

Summary: async.operations.all can create multiple entries for 1 SKU
Custom field (Release Note): Concurrent requests to save and update the same product are now serialized to prevent race conditions  which may result in data inconsistency or duplicated products

Summary: Duplicate of AC-13913 - Static attribute cleaning asynchronously.
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, there is no 'Undefined array key "apply_to"' error when numerous instances of the \Magento\CatalogImportExport\Model\Import\Product\Type\AbstractType are created.

Summary: Restricted admin users can't mass update product status
Custom field (Release Note): The custom admin can mass update product status as it's a website-level property. The status is updated only on the websites the restricted admin has access too.

Summary: Concurrent Calls to Reorder GraphQL API - Same Products Added to Different Rows
Custom field (Release Note): Fixes the issue where concurrent calls to the Reorder GraphQL API result in the same products being added as different rows, leading to data inconsistencies.

Summary: Exception "Cannot create rendition for media asset paths" during image insertion
Custom field (Release Note): After removing the values of the Maximum Width and Maximum Height of the Media Gallery Image Optimization configuration, the error is not occurred any more during the image optimization process.

Summary: updateCustomerEmail GraphQL mutation(Change email Address) doesn't trigger the email Notification
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, email was not sent to customers after successfully updating their email addresses on their accounts. After the fix has been applied, customers now receive email notifications after successfully updating their email addresses.

Summary: Not able to preview Scheduled Product update with Category Permissions enabled
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix a future to be enabled product was not being displayed in preview mode. Now it will be displayed even if the current status is disabled.

Summary: New currency (XCG) support in Adobe
Custom field (Release Note): Caribbean Guilder (XCG) is added to the currencies list.

Summary: [Cloud] Delete operation is forbidden for current area error during customer account creation
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix saving a customer with an invalid address returns a message describing the reason for invalidity instead of irrelevant "Delete operation is forbidden for current area".

Summary: No store is available after redirecting to home page and checkout
Custom field (Release Note): Previously selected store will now be pre-selected in the “Pick in Store” shipping if the customer navigates to the payment page, then returns to the home page, and finally returns to the checkout page. Previously, after repeatedly returning to the checkout page, the selected store in the “Pick in Store” would be cleared.

Summary: Unassigning categories in a B2B shared catalog via the REST API is slow
Custom field (Release Note): Now the performance is significantly improved when unassigning categories in B2B. Previously, it took a long time to unassign categories in the B2B shared catalog.

Summary: Dynamic Attribute Not Updating in Gift Registry via updateGiftRegistry Mutation
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, before this fix through the updateGiftRegistry mutation, the custom attribute of the gift registry was not modified or updated through GraphQL mutations. After this fix has been applied, the dynamic attribute of the gift registry can successfully be updated through the updateGiftRegistry mutation.

Summary: [Cloud] Recent Orders not appearing in other store view if the orders are created on one store view
Custom field (Release Note): Resolved an issue where the "My Account" page did not display recent orders from other Store Views within the same Store. The order retrieval logic has been updated to ensure consistent order visibility across all Store Views, aligning with the behavior of the "My Orders" page.

Summary: Scope is showing different Store View during Preview
Custom field (Release Note): Previous to the fix, a staging update preview of cms block and cms page content might have opened in a different store, than the store assigned on the cms block or page when accessed from Content Staging Dashboard. After the fix, if the cms block or page have only a specific store assigned in the staging update, the preview from Content Staging Dashboard will open with the correct store selected.

Summary: All items from other customers compare lists are assigned to the customer after logging in via the admin
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, when an admin used the "Login as Customer" feature in the backend, products from the compare list of a previously logged-in customer were incorrectly assigned to the currently impersonated customer.  After the fix the compare list loads correctly for the correct logged-in customer.

Summary: [Staging2] Stored cards are not visible on Admin panel
Custom field (Release Note): Fixes the issue where the "Stored Card" payment option no longer appeared in the backend order placement form after an upgrade.

Summary: Bundled/Merged JS not part of SRI Hashes
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix generated bundle or merged files were not being added to SRI hashes list. Now, the files are being proprly added to the SRI hashes.

Summary: Upgrade compatibility Tool with wrong critical issue
Custom field (Release Note): N/A

Summary: Missing validation for Catalog Price rule discount amount field
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, the discount_amount field in the staging schedule update was not validated correctly with the current validation rules. However, after applying the fix, the discount_amount field will be validated appropriately.

Summary: [Mainline] [CLOUD] Image Resizing consumes over 400GB of disk space
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, the `catalog:images:resize` command used with `--skip_hidden_images` flag will not generate image caches for websites where images are not present.

Summary: Issue with upgrade 2.4.7-p5 due to added new validation
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue in the SchemaBuilder class where an undefined array key "column" caused a crash during schema creation or updates. This occurred when processing table data that did not include a "column" key.

Summary: qty showing as  0 in the admin customer shopping cart section while adding BUNDLE products
Custom field (Release Note): The Shopping Cart section in Customer Activities now displays the correct quantity. Previously, the quantity was shown as 0.

Summary: Order "base_row_total" and "row_total" show single item price in REST API response
Custom field (Release Note): REST api response for order details now contains correct values for "base_row_total" and "row_total" attributes in case when several same items were ordered

Summary: Product graphql missing media_type in MediaGalleryInterface
Custom field (Release Note): The MediaGallery GraphQL request now includes the "types" field for product image types. Previously, this "types" field did not exist in the MediaGallery GraphQL request.

Summary: is_available attribute in CartItemInterface returns false even when salable stock is high
Custom field (Release Note): The is_available attribute returns true when salable stock is high. Previously, it always return false.

Summary: [QUANS]Server Issue Potentially Caused by Invalid S3 Access Key
Custom field (Release Note): Incorrect AWS S3 credentials no longer causes pages to load infinitely on storefront.

Summary: Categories in admin are loading very slow
Custom field (Release Note): The category loading performance has a significant improved. Previously, it took so long to load the category that caused a timeout issue.

Summary: Opensearch 2.19.1 illegal_argument_exception on one-priced categories
Custom field (Release Note): Opensearch is no longer throwing an illegal_argument_exception on the categories containing all products with the same price. Previously, it has this exception "[from] parameter cannot be negative".

Summary: Page Builder Product Widget ordering not being applied in GraphQL
Custom field (Release Note): Fixes the issue where the GraphQL "route" query response did not return products in the correct sort order within a Page Builder Products content type.

Summary: Update product url_key via REST API does not generate a 301 URL Rewrite
Custom field (Release Note): When updating the URL key of the product via the REST API, with the "Create Permanent Redirect for URLs if URL Key Changed" setting set to Yes, the product URL rewrites are create a redirect from old URL to a new one.

Summary: [Cloud] Sitemap generation never ends
Custom field (Release Note): Previous to the fix, the sitemap generation could not finish successfully if the catalog contained more than a million products. After the fix, the sitemap generation will finish with lower memory allocation and with as many as one million products per store.

Summary: Gift Card email is sent even if order invoice fails
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the implementation of this fix, gift card emails were sent after the invoice had been created. However, after the fix was applied, gift card emails are now sent after invoices have been successfully saved and committed.

Summary: Staging update preview breaks at checkout when using a different admin domain
Custom field (Release Note): A customer can log in and view their cart in store preview mode when the store base URL is different from the admin URL.

Summary: Stock delete operation is not completing
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, deleting a source item doesn't lead to a full reindex and updates only affected products increasing performance.

Summary: [QUANS] [Cloud] Minify js not working
Custom field (Release Note): The following JS files are now fully and correctly minified when JS minification is enabled: mage/backend/tabs.min.j, jquery/jquery.validate.min.js and Magento_PageBuilder/js/form/element/validator-rules-mixin.min.js. As result, Page Builder CSS Class Field Validation works as expected.

Summary: Dynamic image generation generate large number of images
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, images will be generated only for the websites to which the product is assigned.

Summary: [QUANS] - Does Magento_Fedex core module check for a valid-active token before sending a request to get a new one?
Custom field (Release Note): Adobe Commerce is no long make many requests to FedEx API service for the access token. Previously, even though the access token is still valid, Adobe Commerce always make new requests to FedEx API which caused a rate limiting issue.

Summary: Provided CountryID Does not Exist - Ireland (IE)
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, Ireland postcodes are available to search for pickup locations.

Summary: customerOrders graphql returns error when product was deleted
Custom field (Release Note): The customerOrders graphql request is no longer throwing an error even the product in the order was deleted. Previously, "Internal server error" error was thrown.

Summary: Pricing Display Issue on Non-English Storefronts Due to ICU Library Version
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, the product price is displayed correctly in the Hebrew (Israel) locale.

Summary: Updating Store Code Cleared Design Configuration
Custom field (Release Note): Fixes the issue where updating the store view code cleared the Design Configuration settings due to the configuration cache not being properly refreshed.

Summary: Error in mapping message to error code when placing order via GraphQL
Custom field (Release Note): GraphQL calls to place an order for a nonexistent or inactive cart now correctly return CART_NOT_ACTIVE or CART_NOT_FOUND error codes in all store views, fixing an issue where translated error messages previously resulted in an UNDEFINED code.

Summary: Customer Order GraphQL : Retrieve product categories for the associated product is "not visible individually
Custom field (Release Note):
Prior to the fix, if the order contained a hidden product its categories would display an empty array in the Customer Order GraphQl response.
Now, after the fix, the products categories are included in the response of a Customer Order GraphQl request even if the product is hidden.

Summary: [CLOUD] Unable to add products to categories
Custom field (Release Note): Improved performance when adding product to category through Visual Merchandiser.

Summary: Order status stuck on Processing
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, when ordering a bundle product with "Ship toghether" option enabled, the order status did not automatically switch to "complete" after invoice and shipment. Now, after the fix, the order status automatically switches to "complete" after the order has been invoiced and shipped.

Summary: Related products via related product rule not appearing in PDP via GraphQL
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, before this fix was applied, the relative product rule returned empty/null for a product that matched the rule. After this fix has been applied, the relative rule for product returns successfully for matched products.

Summary: [CLOUD] Order information issue with row total appearance for order 000075568
Custom field (Release Note): Fixes the issue where the row_total_incl_tax value in the order API response was returned as a near-zero residual value instead of 0.00 when an item was fully discounted.

Summary: PHP8.4 Deprecation Error: E_USER_ERROR after Upgrade to Adobe Commerce 2.4.8
Custom field (Release Note):
*NO RELEASE NOTES ARE REQUIRED*
Customer-facing scenarios are not affected by the fix.

Summary: [MSI] No indication in admin if the customer was asynchronously notified about Order is Ready for Pickup
Custom field (Release Note): Added to order history notification about the customer was asynchronously notified about Order is Ready for Pickup

Summary: Content Staging Dashboard Display of time incorrect
Custom field (Release Note): Now the "Start Time" and "End Time" date filters in "Content Staging Dashboard" show correct date and time. Previously, incorrect date and time was shown after selecting the date and time in the datepicker

Summary: Csv product import : Unable to unset a swatch image
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix you were not able to update the swatch image of a product through product import. Now, after the fix, if you mark the product swatch image column with the configured empty marker, the image will be set to hidden.

Summary: [Cloud] Free Shipping discount not correctly removed when cart no longer meets requirements
Custom field (Release Note): The Subtotal (Excl. Tax) in cart price rule will now incorporate discounts from preceding rules.

Summary: Not possible to leave value empty for "Cap Reward Points Balance At"- Saved
Custom field (Release Note): Adobe Commerce now allows merchants to leave the Cap Reward Points Balance At field empty while still setting a value for Rewards Points Balance Redemption Threshold. Previously, when configuring reward points under Stores > Configuration > Customers > Reward Points, entering a positive number for Rewards Points Balance Redemption Threshold and leaving Cap Reward Points Balance At blank triggered the validation error: "The \"Cap Reward Points Balance\" is invalid. The balance needs to be a positive number or left empty. Verify and try again.", preventing merchants from saving the configuration without a cap. ACP2E-3977

Summary: Wishlist items are not shared between stores views within one website in GraphQL request
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, wishlist items were filtered by store id. Now, after the fix, wishlist items are filtered by website.

Summary: [Cloud] getRemoteAddress return 127.0.0.1 on Production
Custom field (Release Note): Previous to this fix the remote address was not determined correctly when application server is used. After the fix the remote address is properly determined combined with proper header setup in nginx and header configuration.

Summary: Customer password reset through GraphQL doesn't honour the restrictions
Custom field (Release Note): Resolved an issue where customer password reset requests made through GraphQL mutations did not comply with the password reset restrictions configured under Store > Configuration > Customers > Customer Configuration > Password Options. These settings are now correctly enforced.

Summary: GraphQl invalid discount calculation
Custom field (Release Note): GraphQL now correctly displays discount percentages and base prices when catalog prices are configured to include tax. Previously, rounding errors occurred, such as displaying 19.99% instead of 20%.

Summary: No such entity with cartId = X error is shown on Storefront when login B2B company user from admin feature  "Login as Customer"
Custom field (Release Note): Now "No such entity with cartId = X" error is no longer visible after successfully login from admin backend when using "Login as Customer" feature.

Summary: Cron job not clearing the database table - causing outage due to Galera crash
Custom field (Release Note): Changelog tables cleanup is now running in batches to avoid heavy delete operations.

Summary: [Cloud]Magento OOTB code - Email Template Setup issue
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, when using async email sending, shipment emails were incosisten with the store order. Now, after the fix, the proper store shipment email order is delivered.

Summary: Cancel invoice redirects to 404
Custom field (Release Note): Cancellation of the invoice made with Not Capture type does not lead to page 404 anymore.

Summary: Special price is not taking into effect with websites created with different timezones
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, the special price date validity was created in scope of current store timestamp. Now, after the fix, the default store timezone is taken into consideration.

Summary: Sales Archive Cron jobs are causing DB locking issues
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, unbound DELETE queries located in order archive cron was causing issues with Galera. Now, after the update, delete queries are executed with limits.

Summary: Restricted admin user can save/update default configurations despite Store-Specific Permissions
Custom field (Release Note): Fixes the issue where restricted admin users were able to see and attempt to update the "Default Config" scope despite being assigned only to specific website scopes, which could cause confusion.

Summary: Missing billing address prevents order placing with "In store Delivery" shipping method
Custom field (Release Note): Resolved an issue where the billing address was not automatically populated during checkout when In-Store Pickup was selected as the delivery method. Without a billing address, checkout could not be completed.

Summary: [QUANS] Confirm GQL order placement exception handling behaviour reversion
Custom field (Release Note): Addressed backward incompatible change for placeOrder mutation.

Summary: Issue mapping translated message to error code when placing order via GraphQL
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue when translated exception message was used to map the error code for GraphQL Requests, causing an unknown error codes for known errors.

Summary: Configurable product price saved under DB for any store view scope, causing issues in the Products in Category sorting feature where the saved price has no relevance in frontend
Custom field (Release Note): Removed the "Use Default Value" checkbox for a configurable product when price is configured per website and a store view is selected on the admin UI configurable product edit page.

Summary: Product Import generates Empty URLs for Store Scope
Custom field (Release Note): Product URL key in store view will now inherit the value set in default scope if url_key has empty value in the import data source. Previously setting url_key to an empty value in import data source for a store view record would lead to url_key being overridden with empty value in that scope.

Summary: 500 error occurs on frontend, due to incorrect layout structure is cached in layout
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue when a page would return a 500 error code, due to an incorrect layout structure being cached in the layout

Summary: [QUANS]Admin Password Policy Does Not Meet PCI DSS 4.0 Compliance (Minimum 12 Characters)
Custom field (Release Note): Administrators can now configure the minimum password length requirement for admin users through Stores > Configuration > Advanced > Admin > Security. This enhancement provides greater security flexibility while maintaining existing password policies. The validation is enforced both during admin user creation/modification and configuration saves, with real-time frontend validation for improved user experience.

Summary: Product Views Report Incorrect - Lower Count Compared to GA
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed a bug where report_viewed_product_index table wasn't showing the correct number of product page views.

Summary: Unknown IPNs from PayPal abuses application IPN processor
Custom field (Release Note): The IPN handler now ignores unsupported or unknown IPN types. Instead of returning a 500 error, it logs the issue and continues processing without interruption.

Summary: Date filter issue when admin interface language is Japanese
Custom field (Release Note): Birthday filter and column will use the unified format M/d/y, same as "Customer Since" filter/column

Summary: Scope is showing different Store View during Preview for scheduled update products and category
Custom field (Release Note): Previous to this fix the preview link for categories and products did not generate for the correct store. After this fix, the preview link will automatically select the store on which the preview was created on.

Summary: Validation error for Catalog Price rule discount amount field in Scheduled Update
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, before fixing this issue, for the schedule update for the catalog price rule, if the discount amount is by_fixed then it was not validated properly because of the validation-number-range rule. After this fix has been applied, the validation works properly for fixed price catalog price rule.

Summary: The product import process encounters an error if a multi-select attribute is configured as required
Custom field (Release Note): Resolved an issue where product imports failed if a required attribute of type multi-select was included. The data validation now correctly passes, allowing the product import process to complete successfully.

Summary: Not minified JS sometimes loads ignoring 'enable js minifications'
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, even if you had minification enabled some of the JS files were requested without the "min" prefix resulting in 404 status code. After the fix, when minification is enabled there are no non-minified JS resources requested.

Summary: [Cloud] cache_invalidate over 10K logs
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, cache was cleared on each PLP or Cart visit, causing unnecessary performance overhead. Target rule cache is no longer invalidated on these pages, improving browsing efficiency.

Summary: Date Attribute in custom Attribute Group Fails to Show Datepicker in Admin
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed issue where the calendar popup for date attributes appeared off-screen when assigned to custom attribute groups.

Summary: Issue with Updated Orders with Configurable Options Using REST API
Custom field (Release Note): Preserve existing product options on sales order items when updating an order through rest api endpoints.

Summary: PayflowPro saved card token failed on payment
Custom field (Release Note): PayPal PayFlow Pro transaction IDs (PNREFs) are now valid for use in Reference Transactions for a fixed period of 12 months. Once expired, the saved card will no longer be displayed and must be added again. Previously, the validity was determined by the expiration date of the payment card used in the original transaction.

Summary: VAT Validation fails because of VAT API rate limiter - triggers false positive customer group change
Custom field (Release Note): Optimized the requests to Europa Vat validation tool, that results in less "rate limiter" error

Summary: Simple Products unassigned When Configurable Product Edited by Limited Role
Custom field (Release Note): Previous to this fix, if a restricted admin user would save a configurable product that contain simple products that the admin user didn't have access to, were removed from the configurable product on save. After the fix the configurable product is preserved as saved from a full right admin.

Summary: Bulk Deletion in Core Indexer Triggering Maximum Writeset Size Error on Production
Custom field (Release Note): Optimizes catalog rule product index cleanup by implementing two deletion strategies based on data volume.

Summary: REST API endpoint export-stock-salable-qty returns incorrect items total_count
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed pagination issue in inventory export stock salable quantity API where total_count was incorrectly limited to page size. Previously, when using the /rest/all/V1/inventory/export-stock-salable-qty/website/base endpoint with pagination parameters like page_size=5, the total_count field in the response would return 5 instead of the actual total number of products matching the search criteria. After this fix, the total_count field now correctly reflects the total number of products available regardless of the page_size parameter, ensuring consistent pagination behavior across all Magento REST API endpoints.

Summary: [CLOUD] Customer Order filter not working for Dates
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, retrieving orders through GraphQL using a date range filter returns the correct result.

Summary: Content staging preview does not work with search results
Custom field (Release Note): Search in Staging Preview now returns products in accordance with the selected scope. Previously, the search returned results in the default scope, disregarding the selected store.

Summary: Page Builder - Product Condition Logic Issue (OR logic behaves incorrectly showing less products)
Custom field (Release Note): Page Builder Products Widget now returns correct result when an attribute with global scope is used in "Match Any" condition

Summary: [B2B] Shared Catalog Save Returns Deprecated Functionality Error
Custom field (Release Note):
Admin can successfully unassign products from Shared Catalog.
Previously unassigning products with large number of long product SKUs from Shared Catalog resulted in error

Summary: Admin Actions Log User Report doesnt show details of what filter was used when applying filters
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, filtering parameters were not being logged in the admin activity report. Now, after the fix, all request data is being logged.

Summary: Regular price is not visible, even though a special price is applied.
Custom field (Release Note): Resolved an issue where the regular price was not displayed when a special price was applied. The regular price now correctly appears alongside the special price as expected.

Summary: Duplicated stock status queries on quote load
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed duplicate execution of cataloginventory_stock_status query when loading a quote on the storefront, causing redundant DB calls.

Summary: White Blocks Appearing on Both Sides of Admin Grid Header
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed visual alignment issue in admin grids. Previously, when scrolling horizontally through product grids in the admin panel, white blocks would appear misaligned on the left and right sides of the grid header. The grid header elements now maintain proper vertical alignment when scrolling, providing a cleaner visual experience for administrators managing large product catalogs.

Summary: [Cloud] Bundle product price issue
Custom field (Release Note): Price for Bundle Product with special price is shown correctly on PDP/PLP for non default currency

Summary: [Cloud] Store Switcher Not Working from EN to FR for FAQ Page
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue where switching between store views redirected users to the homepage instead of the corresponding translated CMS page. The store switcher now checks for URL rewrites in the target store to ensure correct redirection (e.g., FAQ page in English → FAQ page in French).

Summary: Production ACL Permission Check caused Performance Degradation – populateAcl Method is the bottleneck
Custom field (Release Note): Optimized ACL rules processing

Summary: Address issues raised in ACP2E-4031
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix the error node position did not provide seamless compatibility with 2.4.7 and 2.4.9 versions. Now, after the fix, the error node is properly placed to accomodate both versions.

Summary: [CLOUD] Products with No Backorders selected on manage stock still allowing customers to order over our stock levels when imported
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, it is no longer possible to import an unacceptable value for the "allow_backorders" attribute of the product.

Summary: Duplicate order found for same customer in Multishipping
Custom field (Release Note): Concurrent requests to place order with multiple shipping addresses no longer result in duplicated orders for same customer

Summary: Product import failing due to Description length exceeding 65,536 characters Validation
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, it's possible to import product attributes with type text whose values exceed 65,536 characters.

Summary: [CLOUD] Getting 404 for JS file on checkout page on first attempt after implementing sri patch
Custom field (Release Note): Previous to the fix mixins would not have loaded in cart and checkout when minify and bundling enabled. After the fix, all mixins should load as expected.

Summary: [Cloud] Deactivate the old sitemap generation
Custom field (Release Note): A new configuration option is now available to switch between the standard sitemap generation process and a newly implemented batch mode. This enhancement allows for greater flexibility and scalability in sitemap creation workflows.

Summary: Products displays as out of stock after disabling
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, disabled products are not present in the products widget.

Summary: [Cloud] No such entity with cartId
Custom field (Release Note): Resolved an issue where using Login as Customer with two company admin accounts in the same session caused a “No such entity with cartId” error.

Summary: Validation issue with custom option IDs in cart item REST APIs.
Custom field (Release Note): REST APIs V1/guest-carts/<cartId>/items/ and V1/carts/mine/items/ now validate "product_options.extension_attributes.custom_options.*.option_id" to ensure it references a valid option_id for the cart item SKU. Previously, this parameter was processed and saved in the database without validation.

Summary: Post-Patch ACP2E-4118: Stock Threshold Change in Admin Causes Negative Salable Quantities and Stock Status Mismatch
Custom field (Release Note): Inventory stock status is now automatically adjusted when global inventory configurations Quantity, Backorders and Out-of-Stock Threshold are updated via import.

Summary: Header Login/Logout Not Updating in Multi-Store Setup with Shared Cookies
Custom field (Release Note): Login header is updated correctly on logout in accordance with config settings. The customer-data.js will use a cookie to store the 'mage-customer-login' value if customer accounts are shared globally. Local storage will be used otherwise.

Summary: [Cloud] Sitemap generation performance is significantly degraded
Custom field (Release Note): Sitemap generation for products with images no longer experiences exponential slowdown. Previously, generating sitemaps for stores with image inclusion enabled would result in long processing times.

Summary: For Shipping Information Server Side Validation is not Working using REST API
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue in the REST API where shipping address information validation did not adhere to the attribute configuration defined in the Admin backend. The validation now properly follows the configured settings.

Summary: Error when create credit memo for offline refund
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue where creating a credit memo failed for bundle products with the setting Dynamic Price = No. Credit memos can now be created successfully without errors.

Summary: [Cloud] Errors with duplicate entries (temp_category_descendants_%)
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed issue with duplicate entries during creation scheduled updates for enviroments with high number of nested categories

Summary: Export Filters for Product Yes-No Attributes Not Functioning as Expected
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, exported products filtered by a Yes/No attribute contain the expected products that respect the applied filters.

Summary: Ui component fileUploader not working correctly on 2.4.8-p1/ 2.4-develop
Custom field (Release Note): Improved file upload for custom ui component with multiple select to allow upload on upload area click.

Summary: [CLOUD] Admin Report does not show details when inventory is updated
Custom field (Release Note): Product inventory source changes are now being logged by logging module. Prior to the fix, when saving a product and performing inventory related changes, details were not being logged.

Summary: Bundle parent showing Out of stock even the child has instock in Graphql call
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, requesting a product list using GraphQL returns the correct stock status for bundle products.

Summary: [Cloud] Order return page for bundle product row gets auto unselected
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, for the bundle product Ship Together Return in the admin panel grid view, we had an option "Select Items" which created confusion for the bundle product Ship Together option. After this fix is applied, for bundle product shipments, there are no more "Select items" option.

Summary: GraphQL mergeCart mutation discrepancies
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, the merge carts GraphQL request properly checks the product quantity, taking into account the stock configuration.

Summary: GetCart GraphQL Media Gallery Field Returns Empty Data after cache flush
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, product's media_gallery is returned as expected in the GraphQL response for the cart request.

Summary: Duplicate file headers in Advanced Report CSV files causing empty reports
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, reports generated for the advanced reporting feature no longer contain duplicated header rows in cases when the row count exceeds the batch size.

Summary: [B2B] Webapi requests go infinite loop for logged-in customers when 'eav' cache disabled
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, disabling the eav cache doesn't lead to an infinite loop during certain REST requests.

Summary: [Cloud] Stock limit exceeded notification message is displayed twice when Out-of-Stock Threshold is hit
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed the issue where cart updates could show duplicate error banners. Previously, after an AJAX validation error the backend added the same message again during form submission, so shoppers would see two identical alerts. Now we skip adding the extra backend message, keeping the cart page to a single clear error banner.

Summary: GraphQL Exception in SWAT
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, responses for GraphQL requests are aligned with the GraphQL over HTTP specs. A 4XX response code is returned when it's impossible to parse the request, the request is not authorized, or there is another general problem with the request. If the request is parsed and can be processed, a 200 response code will be returned.

Summary: [Cloud] php-fpm not respecting max_execution_time
Custom field (Release Note): Deployment configuration is now loaded once in a single request.

Summary: [On Prem] Newly Created Orders/Companies/ Customers Automatically Included in "Select All" Scope During select Process
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed the issue where manually selecting all records on a stale admin grid page would unintentionally delete all records when performing mass actions. Previously, the grid would automatically switch to "select all" mode internally when the number of selected items matched the total count, causing mass actions to affect all records instead of just the explicitly selected ones.

Summary: "Confirm Form Resubmission" on Catalog Search with "Remember Category Pagination"
Custom field (Release Note):
Navigating back from a product page to the Catalog Search Results page after modifying toolbar settings no longer triggers the "Confirm Form Resubmission" dialog when "Remember Category Pagination" is enabled.
Previously, users encountered a browser error or a warning about form resubmission when returning to the search results page after changing toolbar parameters like sort order.

Summary: Changelog cleanup performance issue after ACP2E-3995
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, the indexer_clean_all_changelogs cron job fully cleans changelogs, keeping batching in place.

Summary: Bundle product with scheduled updates removes the bundle items option on product save action
Custom field (Release Note): Removing bundle product options or associated products in scheduled update no longer affects the original bundle options and associated products and vice versa. Also removing bundle production options in the original product and replacing with another options after scheduling an update no longer results in the removal of the newly added options

Summary: Bundle product being unable to add to cart while marked as in stock
Custom field (Release Note):
Bundle product stock status now correctly reflects child product reservations and out-of-stock thresholds.
Previously, bundle products were marked as "in stock" even when one or more child products lacked sufficient salable quantity. This led to "Not enough items for sale" errors when adding the bundle to the cart.

Summary: For Billing Information Server Side Validation is not Working using shipping-information REST API
Custom field (Release Note): Customer address data validation has been improved to be more consistent between REST and GraphQl for checkout.

Summary: Solution from ACP2E-3362 works slowly on MariaDB 10.6
Custom field (Release Note): Improved performance of the frontend search page in case of large number historical search requests.

Summary: Issue with Promotion Preview Mode where applied coupons disappear shortly after being applied.
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, voucer codes could not be used properly in staging preview mode. Now, after the fix, voucher codes are properly applied on the checkout page.

Summary: While fetching the product from cart and changing the store header language not changing
Custom field (Release Note): GraphQL customerCart query now returns product attribute values according to the store header value. Previously, changing the store header language while retrieving a product from the cart via GraphQL did not reflect the updated language, resulting in inconsistent localization.

Summary: [Mobile] Fotorama can open Mini Cart on Image Viewer close action
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed the issue with Fotorama. Previously, a Mini Cart would open on the Image Viewer's close action

Summary: Grouped product incorrectly shows as Out of Stock on PDP after import from CSV when child is assigned to custom source/stock (fixed after manual reindex)
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, creating a composite product using import automatically performs stock reindexation, making the product available without the need for manual reindex.

Summary: RedisRequestLogger\RedisClient (rate limiter) exception on Application Server
Custom field (Release Note): After the fix, the Rate limiting feature can be used together with the GraphQL Application server in cases where the PHP redis extension is installed.

Summary: Date Filter not working according to store timezone on Credit Memos grid
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix filtering lists by date attributes were causing missing items because of timezone differences between selected date and stored dates Now, after the fix date filters are properly applied.

Summary: File uploader dialog opens twice when pagebuilder is installed
Custom field (Release Note): Before the fix custom component Upload button would trigger twice. After the fix the Upload button works as expected.

Summary: Issue with Update bundle option price per website via Import
Custom field (Release Note): It is now possible to export and import bundle option selection prices per website

Summary: Product not being removed from the compare list after the list is assigned to the customer
Custom field (Release Note):
After a guest user's compare list is assigned to a customer account, products added as a guest can now be removed by the customer.
Previously, removal operations failed because the guest-added items were not properly linked to the customer's account after assignment.

Summary: [Cloud] Bundle product price issue on cart page
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed the Bundle product price issue on the cart page for multiple-currency stores

Summary: Merged js files are not properly generated on projects with many stores.
Custom field (Release Note):
Merging JavaScript files now works correctly when multiple stores are configured.
Previously, files sometimes failed to merge properly in multi-store setups, leading to incomplete or inconsistent results.

Summary: [GraphQl] cart query cart item discount issue on virtual quotes
Custom field (Release Note): Resolved an issue where the GraphQL cart query returned an incorrect discount amount for virtual quotes. Previously, discounts were incorrectly applied to certain virtual products that were not eligible.

Summary: [CLOUD] Compare Products Count missmatch Issue for different stores
Custom field (Release Note): Compare product list now works correctly after switching to another storeview

Summary: [MSI] Failing MFTF tests related to latest mainline changes.
Custom field (Release Note): Before the fix guest customers choosing In-Store Pickup without a shipping address had their billing address auto-filled with the store’s address, which couldn’t be changed, leading to incorrect invoice details. After the fix billing address is now editable in this scenario, allowing guests to enter their own details. Registered users will see their saved billing address instead of the store’s.

Summary: Customer segments sort order inconsistency is causing X-Magento-Vary cookie to regenerate all the time on some pages
Custom field (Release Note): X-Magento-Vary cookie now sets one time on product page, previously with some configurations of customer segments the cookie sets several time during PDP loading

Summary: [Unit Test] Magento\GiftCardImportExport\Test\Unit\Model\Import\Product\Type\GiftCardTest::testIsRowValid
Custom field (Release Note): Fix was provided for a random failing unit test

Summary: 414 Error on 'Search for Pickup Location' Endpoint with Large Cart Sizes
Custom field (Release Note):
Selecting a store during checkout using "Pick in Store" no longer fails due to long URLs when many products are in the cart.
Previously, this triggered a 414 error caused by excessively long URLs generated during store selection, preventing customers from completing checkout.

Summary: Incorrect inventory reservation created for virtual gift cards
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the implementation of this fix, the quantity of a virtual gift card containing multiple items did not accurately reflect in the inventory reservation. However, after the fix was applied, the quantity of the inventory reservation and stocks became synchronized.

Summary: Vaulted Card issue when placing order on Admin
Custom field (Release Note): Placing an order with stored credit card under website with different a payment action configuration no longer results in an error or wrong transaction type

Summary: "Add New Attribute" button visible for restricted admin user during configurable product creation
Custom field (Release Note):
"Add New Attribute" button is now only visible for general admin user during configurable product creation.
Previously "Add New Attribute" button was shown for restricted admin user

Summary: No option to 'use default' on 'Images and Videos' for Image Role Assignment
Custom field (Release Note): The "Use Default Value" options have been added into the product images and videos section, enabling the inheritance of settings from the default scope.

Summary: Validation errors on deleted customer attributes when changing customer data.
Custom field (Release Note): Before the fix, saving the customer and customer address failed if they included multiple attribute options that had been deleted. After the fix, both can be saved successfully even when multiple attribute options are still present.

Summary: updateCartItems GraphQL incorrect error response
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, when a graphQL request for an item with insufficient quantity was made, a proper error message with an error code was returned, along with the requested quantity and price calculation, even if the item was not available. After this fix was applied, a proper error message with an error code is now returned, and the item’s quantity is set to its old value if it is not available in the response.

Summary: Aggregated search field "_search" is no longer used in the search query
Custom field (Release Note): Now, full-text search returns matching products if the minimum should match condition is met across all searchable fields collectively, rather than requiring the condition to be satisfied by a single field.

Summary: Abandoned cart report contains invalid characters
Custom field (Release Note): Abandoned Cart Report exported as CSV file now contains properly rendered characters for currency symbols like Indian Rupee when opened in MS Excel.

Summary: Restricted Category Products Still Counted in Wishlist After Customer Group Update
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, category permissions were not being applied properly to customer wishlist items. Now, after the fix, wishlist items are properly displayed and paginated in both web and GraphQL.

Summary: [CLOUD] Got writable permission issue in the newrelic
Custom field (Release Note): Before the fix, the logs were cluttered with exceptions. After applying the fix, the logs are now clean and free of exceptions.

Summary: [Cloud] Bundle product price issue on PDP and PLP
Custom field (Release Note): Price for Bundle Product with regular price is shown correctly on PDP/PLP for non default currency

Summary: After the fix for ACP2E-2926, customer segments are being matched on each checkout request, causing unnecessary processing
Custom field (Release Note): Customer segment functionality now includes a caching mechanism to improve performance.

Summary: Customer can place order for inaccessible product after customer group change
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, when changing the customer group from admin, the frontend catalog and cart did not reflect the changes in catalog permissions. However, after applying this fix, the frontend quote now changes according to the updated catalog permissions when the customer group is changed from admin.

Summary: Inventory Reservation Compensation Command Fails with Null and Non-Existent Product References
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed issue when the Inventory reservation compensation CLI would throw an exception if the processed combination had a missing order ID

Summary: Product Image Changes Not Logged in Action Log
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed the issue where product image uploads and deletions were not being tracked in Admin Action Logs. Previously, when administrators added new images to a product or deleted existing images from the product's media gallery, these changes were not recorded in the logging system. Only changes to image roles (such as assigning an image as the main product image, thumbnail, or small image) were being logged. Now, all media gallery changes including image additions and deletions are properly logged in the Admin Action Logs, providing complete audit trail visibility for product image management activities.

Summary: Reindexing stuck due to high memory usage
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed the issue where the catalog rule indexer consumed excessive memory and failed to complete, causing instability and out-of-memory errors.

Summary: Cannot navigate between websites in Schedule Update preview
Custom field (Release Note): Before this fix, scheduled update preview would break when attempting to preview content for stores with custom domains. After this fix, custom store domains can be previewed as is and navigated within the preview iframe. The fix covers products, categories, CMS pages, and CMS blocks, and supports navigation links using `{{store url}}` markup tags as documented in [Adobe Commerce Variables and Markup Tags](https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-admin/systems/variables/markup-tags).

Summary: Update for MDVA-19640 for 2.4.8 compatibility
Custom field (Release Note): The fix moves the analytics cron job tasks from the default group into analytics group

Summary: Store specific sender is not used for gift card emails
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, when sending an email template for a gift card after an invoice was created from a different store, the owner’s name in the admin configuration settings would not be reflected in the email headers when the customer received the email. After this fix was applied, the email headers now include the appropriate store owner’s email information.

Summary: Error loading some locale
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue where creating a customer account failed when using the Arabic locale and the Date of Birth attribute was set to display on the storefront. The account can now be created successfully in this configuration.

Summary: Cross-Website Guest Order Assignment Bug in MergeGuestOrder Plugin
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, a guest order customer assignment was not considering account sharing options. Now, after the fix, an order is assigned to a customer if customer and order store match (given that the customer account sharing option is set to "Per website".

Summary: Checkout not loading in latest version with AC-15867 + ACP2E-4296 and SCD compact
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, having custom javascripts loaded through the head section could have caused issues. After the introduction of the new setting, such scripts can be automatically defered, insuring greater compatibility with Magento 2 framework.

Summary: [CLOUD] The Fastly cache is not working after we upgrade to 2.4.8
Custom field (Release Note): Resolved an issue where cacheable pages were not properly stored or served from Fastly cache, resulting in inconsistent caching behavior and reduced performance.

Summary: Suspicious requests are throwing exceptions in the exception.log
Custom field (Release Note):
Fixed an issue where malicious or malformed URL requests were causing database collation errors and filling up exception logs.
Previously, when suspicious requests containing invalid character encodings or unsupported characters were received, the system would attempt to decode and process them, leading to MySQL collation conflicts.

Summary: Delete default website/store breaks tier prices API endpoint
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, deleting the default base website and using the secondary website as the default website resulted in an error when attempting to update the tier price for the secondary website. However, after applying this fix, the tier price can be successfully updated even if the base website is deleted or deactivated.

Summary: JS warning in the admin dashboard: "Expected to start loader but did not find one in the dom"
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed the JavaScript warning that appeared in the browser console when Charts were enabled for the admin dashboard. Previously, when accessing the admin dashboard with charts enabled, an obsolete debug check would incorrectly warn "Expected to start loader but did not find one in the dom" even though the functionality was working correctly.

Summary: [CLOUD] Configuration With Dependency Config Editable When Use Default Checked in Store Configuration
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed the issue when System Configuration fields could render enabled after page load, despite “Use Default/Website” being checked.

Summary: Deprecation warning: use moment.updateLocale(localeName, config) to change an existing locale. moment.defineLocale(localeName, config)
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix a deprecated warning was being thrown in browser console. Now, after the fix, there is no such warning displayed anymore.

Summary: [CLOUD] DateTimeZone error when saving product changes via REST API
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix a product update REST API request would generate an error if there was no store with code "default". Now, after the fix the product update request runs fine regardless if a "default" store exists or not.

Summary: Product carousel adds incorrect products to Page Builder
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, a configurable product would have been automatically included in PageBuilder product carousel listings if any of its child would have met the filtering conditions. Now, after the fix, the parent product will be included only if the child product is not visible on his own.

Summary: Error Invalid date when updating account information
Custom field (Release Note): Customers can now update their account successfully when using the Arabic locale. Previously, attempts to save the account information, the date of birth failed due to an invalid date error.

Summary: Investigate the reasons for increased redis keys and cache keys creation
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, cache kyes used for remote storage metadata were not expiring. Now, after the fix, you can set a TTL for such cache keys through dependency injection.

Summary: [Cloud] PayflowPro saved card (Vault) last 4 digit is not showing in the order
Custom field (Release Note): Card information is now properly persisted and displayed when using saved cards with the Sales payment action, matching the behavior when using the Authorization payment action for PayflowPro.

Summary: Manage Shopping Cart store scope issues
Custom field (Release Note): Now, shopping cart errors will be displayed to the admin user when managing the shopping cart for a customer assigned to a non-default website. Previously, errors were not displayed.

Summary: Products List widget returns incorrect result if multiple categories are listed in category condition
Custom field (Release Note): The “Catalog Products List” widget will now display accurate results when multiple categories listed in the condition "Category is one of". Previously, only the first category in the list was processed.

Summary: Customer create form error messages are not translated
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue where customer validation error messages were not properly translated and formatted across different interfaces. Validation errors now display correctly translated messages in all areas of the application: storefront, adminhtml, rest api and graphql.

Summary: Sales async by id insert limited to 100 entries per cron run
Custom field (Release Note): Improved processing of the sales grid async insert. One cron run now inserts all pending rows in batches, instead of a strict 100 per run.

Summary: Revenues are not Showing in Orders/Invoice Reports in Admin for Canada website/currency
Custom field (Release Note): Some of the order related reports were not applying store currency rates. After the fix, reports properly apply configured store rates.

Summary: Items in the mini-cart display foreign currency prices without conversion
Custom field (Release Note): Mini-cart now correctly converts currency and displays the accurate amount based on configured conversion rates.

Summary: Coupon times_used resets after partial invoice cancellation
Custom field (Release Note): Coupon times_used count is now updated correctly when an order is partially canceled.

Summary: Error message "The product with ID "1" does not exist." is being repeatedly logged in the exception.log
Custom field (Release Note): Before the fix, critical errors were logged when deleted products were encountered in the Last Ordered Items section. After the fix, merchants can configure whether to log or skip deleted products via the `skipDeletedProductLogging` parameter in di.xml. By default, the behavior remains unchanged for backward compatibility, but merchants can set the parameter to `true` to silently skip deleted products and prevent log noise.

Summary: Incompatibility with MariaDB 10.11
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, installation of the latest Magento 2 version failed when using MariaDB 10.11, preventing completion of the setup process. This issue was resolved by updating database compatibility handling to support MariaDB 10.11.x during installation.

Summary: [Cloud][experienceleague] Catalog Price Rule not applied
Custom field (Release Note): Before the fix catalog price rules did not apply when `special_price` was set only at website level (not at "All Store Views"). After the fix catalog price rules now apply correctly when `special_price` is set at website level by checking the website's default store first.

Summary: Unable to import a customer with an uppercase email address
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an undefined array key error when importing customers with uppercase emails when Account Sharing is set to Global. Email normalization is now consistent throughout the import process, ensuring customers can be imported regardless of email case. Website-level account sharing behavior remains unchanged.

Summary: Warning message during send invitation functionality
Custom field (Release Note):
Fixed the issue where the warning message "Maximum X email addresses allowed" was not displayed when adding email fields on the Send Invitations page if the "Allow Customers to Add Custom Message to Invitation Email" setting was disabled.
Previously, the warning only appeared when custom messages were enabled, creating an inconsistent user experience. Now, the maximum email limit warning is displayed consistently regardless of the custom message configuration setting.

Summary: Product is out of stock after changing the SKU case
Custom field (Release Note): Modifying the SKU case no longer causes the product to be out-of-stock on the storefront.

Summary: [Cloud] Media Gallery folder creation requires delete_folder permission in New Media Gallery – roles with only create_folder cannot create folders
Custom field (Release Note): Previously, before this fix was implemented, an admin user with only content create folder permission could not create a folder in the CMS media gallery. However, after the fix, content creators in the media gallery can now create folders with only the create folder permission.

Summary: Product save fails when Catalog Rule active and Realtime mode enabled
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue where catalog rule indexing could fail with a DDL transaction error during product save operations by decoupling Catalog Rule indexing from the product transaction.

Summary: Display balance on Gift Card is not restricted by Website Scope
Custom field (Release Note): Restricted the Gift Card balance check with the assigned Website Scope.

Summary: Order by price/price facets with invalid data
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix, bundle prices were not indexed properly when child products were having stock under custom sources. Now, after the fix, bundle prices are indexed properly regardles of child product stock assignment.

Summary: Double tax on second credit memo refund
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed incorrect tax calculation in credit memos when creating a partial refund from an invoice after a previous credit memo was created from the order view page.

Summary: Stock Status incorrectly reset to in stock with the qty after SKU change during staging update
Custom field (Release Note): SKU changes are now prohibited for products with an active Scheduled Update; saves will fail with a clear error, and the admin SKU field is disabled during active updates. This prevents MSI inventory inconsistencies caused by SKU changes during staging rollbacks.

Summary: Async Invoice Refund API Creates Offline Refunds Instead of Online Refunds
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed async refund operations where refund requests with the `is_online` parameter were not being processed correctly.

Summary: REST API /media endpoint fails for Gift Card products - returns "The product can't be saved"
Custom field (Release Note): Prior to the fix you were allowed to create gift card products that did not include an amount in global scope. With the fix, a validation has been added that checks for amounts in global scope.

Summary: Admin dashboard order graph animates into final size
Custom field (Release Note): The admin dashboard order graph will now display immediately without the need for an unnecessary resizing animation.

Summary: Page Builder Fails to Save Content in Mobile View Due to JS Error (TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined)
Custom field (Release Note): Fixed an issue that prevented saving pages in Page Builder when adding banners in mobile view.

Summary: [CMS] Scheduled Update Preview Link redirects to Maintenance Page
Custom field (Release Note): Scheduled Update Preview of Home Page Link with Configurable Products correctly displays list of products. Previously it redirected users to Maintenance Page

Summary: [Cloud] ACSD-68499_2.4.8-p2 creates another issue
Custom field (Release Note): When a graphQL request for an item with insufficient quantity was made, a proper error message with an error code was returned, and if the requested quantity is available, the cart update was successful.

Summary: Related products are getting automatically removed
Custom field (Release Note): Related products matched by target rules now remain correctly associated throughout the reindex process

Summary: [QUANS] Duplicating a CMS page
Custom field (Release Note): Previous to this fix, duplication of a cms page with custom layout update would have failed. Now CMS pages with Custom Layout Updates can be duplicated without errors.

Summary: Admin with website-level permissions cannot edit Dynamic Block
Custom field (Release Note): Now, admin users with website scope permissions can edit the content of banners in accessible stored views.
